title: Automatically use column name in title
excerpt:

posts.author: Steven1 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I would like to know if in the future it would be possible to use column information in the item name. For example:

Deadline ‘Name project’

The same would be very useful in updates:
“Hi ‘Name tagged people’, the deadline is at ‘Deadline’ and the status is ‘Status’. Could you explain me why?”

Thanks for your help!
